chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.14 of 2022 Mrs. Mahrukh Haider & another Versus Mst. Farhat Imrana & another Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to non-prosecution (Advocate for appellant has not complied the Court order dated 10.2.23. Dated: 28.11.2023 Mr. Niaz holds brief for Mr. S. Farhat Hussain Naqvi for appellants. -.-.- Appellants and their counsel are not regular and punctual in proceeding with the instant appeal and hence it was dismissed for non- prosecution on 13.012023. Appellants thereafter filed an application for recalling dismissal order but they did not mend their ways as despite order of issuance of notice on such application on 10.02.2023, neither copies were supplied nor cost was paid and the matter was thus fixed for non-prosecution on 14.02.2023 and 07.03.2023. On both the dates a week’s time was granted for compliance but till date compliance has not been made and today even counsel for appellant is not present. The application for recalling of order as to dismissal of appeal on non- prosecution as such is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge
